scripts.build: pnpm build:wasm && vite build && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/rustrum-sdk.d.ts src/index.ts --no-banner && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/pkg', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('src/pkg/rustrum_wasm_bg.wasm', 'dist/pkg/rustrum_wasm_bg.wasm'); fs.copyFileSync('src/pkg/rustrum_wasm.d.ts', 'dist/pkg/rustrum_wasm.d.ts'); fs.copyFileSync('src/pkg/rustrum_wasm.js', 'dist/pkg/rustrum_wasm.js');"
